tool.name: telegram_bulk_send
tool.description: Send a message to multiple Telegram chats in parallel using concurrent browser tabs. Use this instead of calling telegram_send_message multiple times - it is faster and more efficient. Pass all chat names as a single comma-separated string.

parameters.name: chat_names
parameters.description: Comma-separated chat, group, or channel names to send the message to

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message text to send to each chat
